title: Dharmapuri mango harvest peaks; growers want export push from new govt
summary: Dharmapuri's mango harvest hit peak volumes in the second week of May. Growers have asked the new state government to fast-track export protocols for Bangalora and Alphonso varieties.

title: Dharmapuri MLAs join 'Kongu Front' informal grouping in assembly
summary: Newly elected MLAs from Dharmapuri have joined the informal 'Kongu Front' grouping inside the assembly to push regional issues such as Cauvery and Bhavani basin water sharing.

title: Dharmapuri-Krishnagiri stretch toll plazas to enforce new FASTag rules
summary: Toll plazas on the Dharmapuri-Krishnagiri stretch of NH-44 will move to strict enforcement of the new FASTag balance and number-plate matching rules from May 9.

title: Dharmapuri women want ₹1,000 scheme expanded to widows under 40
summary: Women's groups in Dharmapuri have asked the incoming government to expand the ₹1,000 monthly scheme to cover widows under 40, a category currently underserved.

title: Krishnagiri-Dharmapuri mango pulping units running at 90% capacity
summary: Mango pulping units across Krishnagiri and Dharmapuri are running at about 90 percent capacity this week, with strong demand from juice brands across India.
